title: Quality-loop factory synthesis config
description: Config for `python -m quality_loop.cli factory <file>`. Targets the legendary tier.

recipe.description: A recipe NAME looked up in the database, or an inline recipe mapping.

oneOf.description: Recipe name in the database (e.g. electronic-circuit).

ingredients.description: Map of ingredient name -> count per craft.

recipe_db.description: Path to the recipe database JSON. Defaults to the bundled data/recipes.json.

output_mode.description: What is extracted: the legendary product item, or one legendary ingredient.

target_ingredient.description: Required when output_mode is 'ingredients': which ingredient to upcycle and extract.

belt_cap.description: Binding-belt cap in items/sec (240 = stacked turbo belt).

machine_key.description: Machine from the engine registry (sets module slots and base productivity).

assembler_speed.description: Measured in-game crafting_speed of the assembler.

recycler_speed.description: Measured in-game crafting_speed of the recycler.

module_tier.description: Quality tier of the modules: a name or an int 0..4.

productivity_research.description: Productivity research percent added to total machine productivity (engine clamps total at +300).

recycling_factor.description: Recycle time as a fraction of craft_time (Factorio default 1/16).
